children.text: development of mechanisms to assure the academic quality of the student experience,
assuring student access to educational resources, expertise, and supervision necessary to achieve community service objectives, and

collaboration with public and private nonprofit agencies, and programs assisted under the National and Community Service Act of 1990 [ et seq.] in the planning, development, and administration of such programs.42 U.S.C. 12501

children.heading: Grants authorized
children.label: 1 Grants authorized
children.text: In addition to funds made available under , the Secretary is authorized to award grants to institutions participating under this part to supplement off-campus community service employment.section 1087–53(b)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: 2 Use of funds
children.text: An institution shall ensure that funds granted to such institution under this subsection are used in accordance with to recruit and compensate students (including compensation for time spent in training and for travel directly related to such community service).section 1087–53(b)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Priority
children.label: 3 Priority
children.text: In awarding grants under this subsection, the Secretary shall give priority to applications that support postsecondary students assisting with early childhood education activities and activities in preparation for emergencies and natural disasters.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 4 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subsection such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009 and each of the five succeeding fiscal years.
